segments.text: Oh, sing to the Lord a new song! Sing to the Lord, all the earth.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Sing to the Lord, bless His name; Proclaim the good news of His salvation from day to day.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Declare His glory among the nations, His wonders among all peoples.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the Lord is great and greatly to be praised; He is to be feared above all gods.
For all the gods of the peoples are idols, But the Lord made the heavens.
Honor and majesty are before Him; Strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.
Give to the Lord, O families of the peoples, Give to the Lord glory and strength.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Give to the Lord the glory due His name; Bring an offering, and come into His courts.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Oh, worship the Lord in the beauty of holiness! Tremble before Him, all the earth.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The Lord reigns; The world also is firmly established, It shall not be moved; He shall judge the peoples righteously.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the heavens rejoice, and let the earth be glad; Let the sea roar, and all its fullness;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the field be joyful, and all that is in it. Then all the trees of the woods will rejoice before the Lord.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For He is coming, for He is coming to judge the earth. He shall judge the world with righteousness, And the peoples with His truth.
